prompt: Say hello, then ask me one friendly question.
I feel nervous before a performance. Respond kindly in two or three sentences.
Write a four-line poem about a forgotten key.
Invent a name and a one-sentence description for a tiny imaginary museum.
Rewrite 'the room was quiet' as a tense, suspenseful sentence.
Suggest two simple ways to pass the time while waiting for a bus.
Explain how to make a cup of tea in a few simple steps.
Name three ordinary objects that could be red. Use a comma-separated list.
Continue this dialogue with one natural reply: A: I can't remember why I came in here. B:
Tell a short, harmless joke about a calendar.
Give one reason to keep old letters and one reason to throw them away.
Describe a city at night in two sentences without using the word dark.
